title: Assessment
subtitle: Therapist's notes — included in the patient report.
empty: No assessment yet. Click edit to record anamnesis, history, pain and treatment.
anamnesePh: How the patient is, complaint, life history, habits…
antecedentsPh: Surgeries, past conditions and relevant history (what the questionnaires don't capture).
painLocationPh: e.g. upper thoracic, lower back, right shoulder…
treatmentPh: Treatment performed and the suggestion that goes into the patient's first report.
errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.
noFields: No fields configured. Set up the Assessment fields in Settings.
findingsImported: Findings added to Anamnesis. Review and validate before saving.
findingsNone: No items above the threshold found in the questionnaires.
findingsHint: Pulls the highest-scoring items (3+) from QRM and Q-SNA for you to review and validate.
atmIntro: Organized as Antecedents, Triggers and Mediators (functional view).

groupHint.objetivo: What the patient most wants to resolve.
groupHint.antecedentes: What raised vulnerability (genetics, childhood, traumas, surgeries, history).
groupHint.gatilhos: What set off the symptoms (events, losses, infections, hormonal changes).
groupHint.mediadores: What keeps it going today (questionnaire symptoms, sleep, stress, pain). Use "Import findings".
groupHint.integracao: Ties it together: patterns, dysregulated systems, plan.
